# Auto MOT Centre Ltd — llms.txt

> Auto MOT Centre Ltd is a DVSA-authorised, family-owned independent garage located at 4 Rectory Rd, Manor Park, London, E12 6JA. Established in 1990, we have served over 5,000 customers across East London.

## What We Do

We provide the following automotive services for all makes and models of cars and light vans (Class 4 vehicles):

- **MOT Testing** — DVSA-authorised Class 4 MOT tests from £40, typically completed in 45 minutes. Free retest within 10 working days.
- **Full Service** — Comprehensive annual service from £120, following AUTODATA manufacturer specifications.
- **Interim Service** — Essential 6-monthly maintenance from £80, including oil change and safety checks.
- **Oil Change** — Premium oil change from £45 using the correct grade specified by AUTODATA for your vehicle.
- **Vehicle Diagnostics** — Electronic fault code reading and system diagnostics from £30.
- **Repairs** — Brakes, clutch, suspension, exhaust, steering, and general mechanical repairs. Quoted in advance.

## Our Team

- **A. Haque** — CEO & Founder, 30+ years automotive experience
- **J. Ahmed** — Senior MOT Tester & Mechanic, DVSA-certified, 15+ years
- **R. Haque** — Mechanic & Service Technician, AUTODATA-trained, 10+ years

## Contact & Location

- **Address:** 4 Rectory Rd, Manor Park, London, E12 6JA
- **Telephone:** 020 8553 9112
- **Email:** info@automotcentre.com
- **Website:** https://automotcentre.com
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/LrM9s7a8T2bqV4qQ9

## Opening Hours

- Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Sunday: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Lunch break: 12:15 – 12:40 PM daily

## Key Facts

- DVSA-authorised MOT testing station
- All servicing performed to AUTODATA manufacturer specifications
- Quality OEM-grade parts used on all repairs
- 12-month / 12,000-mile labour warranty on all repairs
- 4.9★ Google rating from 120+ verified customer reviews
- Family business, established 1990
